Usage: postman flows|fl [options] [command]

Manage and interact with flows.

Options:
  -h, --help                  display help for command

Commands:
  list [options]              List all flows
  trigger [options] <flowId>  Trigger a deployed flow
  deploy [options] <flowId>   Deploy a flow (required to trigger it)
  run [options] <path>        Run a single flow from a file (e.g.
                              ./path/to/flow.json)
  update [options] <flowId>   Update settings for a deployed flow
  list-runs [options]         List run history for a deployed flow
  get-run [options]           Analyze a specific flow run
